# Huntress
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Huntress&prop=wikitext

{{Classbox
| desc = The huntress uses arrows and traps to defeat her enemies.
| weaponSlot = Bow
| weapon = Shortbow
| abilitySlot = Trap
| ability = Hunting Trap
| armor = LeatherArmor
| armorLink = Leather Armors

| hpStart = 130
| hpLevel = 20 - 30
| hpCap = 700

| mpStart = 100
| mpLevel = 2 - 8
| mpCap = 385

| attStart = 12
| attLevel = 1 - 2
| attCap = 75

| defStart = 0
| defLevel = 0
| defCap = 25

| spdStart = 12
| spdLevel = 0 - 2
| spdCap = 50

| dexStart = 12
| dexLevel = 0 - 2
| dexCap = 50

| vitStart = 12
| vitLevel = 0 - 1
| vitCap = 40

| wisStart = 10
| wisLevel = 0 - 2
| wisCap = 50
}}
